remarks: Enjoy convenient downtown living in this top-floor one-bedroom plus den condominium offering 1.5 baths and an open, functional layout. The living and dining area opens to a private balcony, while the den provides the perfect space for a home office or guest room. Additional highlights include in-unit laundry, central air, covered garage parking, elevator access, and a fitness center. Conveniently located near dining, shopping, entertainment, public transportation, and major commuting routes.
